arts.ttl: Rangers fans revel in schadenfreude after Celtic Champions League mauling as gung ho Brendan Rodgers blasted - Hotline
arts.sum: Andy Newport took your calls as punters piled in to share despair or delight as Dortmund demolition job

arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi's Rangers return 'took too long' as Kris Boyd welcomes Philippe Clement u turn
arts.sum: If Rangers were trying to move him on or Ianis Hagi wanted to move on, as soon as that window shut, that's when the negotiations should have started to come to some agreement. Hagi is reportedly set to receive a salary boost upon his 100th game for the team, remained resolute in his determination to fight for a place, leading to a drastic change of heart by Clement and the Rangers management.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd calls out Rangers over Ianis Hagi stand-off as Philippe Clement’s told he took too long
arts.sum: Hagi is back in the Ibrox first team fold after a major U-turn on his bomb squad status

arts.ttl: Cyriel Dessers reminds Celtic with a title warning as Rangers striker declares best is yet to come
arts.sum: The Nigeria star is only too aware that nothing is won or lost in the opening weeks of the season

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd trolls Brendan Rodgers as Rangers hero lands Celtic 'best team' jab on boss after joining Dortmund's Yellow Wall
arts.sum: The former Ibrox hitman didn't waste any time to have a pop at the Hoops
